name: Apple Pancakes or Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together all dry ingredients.
2. Mix the eggs, buttermilk, and oil; add to the dry ingredients and mix gently.
3. Fold in the grated apple.
4. Cook on a lightly oiled griddle. For waffles, double the ingredients and freeze any leftover waffles; reheat on a low setting in a toaster.
(One of my kids' favorite quick breakfasts!)
